keywords: SETNX node-type-reg-lock atomic dual write capability index lock release redis.del deleteDocument catch NodeTypeRegistered NodeTypeAlreadyExists storeDocument both writes
teachingPoint: T619 NodeTypeRegistrar enforces atomic dual-write registration: ORDER 1 = SETNX node-type-reg-lock:{nodeTypeId} (NodeTypeAlreadyExists on lock held), ORDER 2 = storeDocument nodeType to NODE_TYPES_INDEX (GLOBAL scope), ORDER 3 = storeDocument capabilityIndex. catch block MUST release lock via deleteDocument(NODE_TYPE_LOCKS_INDEX, lockKey).catch(() => {}) — never leave a stale lock. NodeTypeRegistered emitted after DNA-8 audit storeDocument.
ironRules: ORDER 1 SETNX: search for node-type-reg-lock:{nodeTypeId} before creating — duplicate lock returns NodeTypeAlreadyExists with no NodeTypeRegistered event
ORDER 2 storeDocument nodeType (NODE_TYPES_INDEX, GLOBAL scope) MUST complete before ORDER 3 capability index write — atomicity depends on order
catch block MUST call deleteDocument(NODE_TYPE_LOCKS_INDEX, lockKey).catch(() => {}) — .catch(() => {}) prevents catch-within-catch error propagation; never omit the lock release
nodeType document stored with scope: 'GLOBAL' — node types are platform-wide, not tenant-scoped
storeDocument(NODE_TYPE_AUDIT_INDEX) MUST complete before enqueue(NodeTypeRegistered) — DNA-8 outbox pattern
